title: sambucus canadensis var. mexicana
intro: Sambucus canadensis var. mexicana is a variety of the American elderberry plant, known for its distinctive red or purple berries and pungent flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. The health benefits of Sambucus canadensis var. mexicana include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and supplements, which are often used to support overall health and wellness.
